/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/AudioNoderC_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/service.c.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/MixerFilter.c.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/VirtualMic.c.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/FinderLinker.c.o CMakeFiles/AudioNoderC.dir/AudioNoderC_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o AudioNoderC  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 -lpipewire-0.3 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
